---
pagetitle: "Games"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: article
toc: false
resources:
  - sigma-strike.html
  - revenge-of-the-basco.html
---

```{=html}
<style>
.arcade-header {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem 0 1rem;
}
.arcade-header h1 {
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: #2A2927;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}
.arcade-header p {
  color: #888;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  margin: 0;
}
.game-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  gap: 2rem;
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 1.5rem auto 3rem;
  padding: 0 1rem;
}
.game-card {
  background: #1C1C1E;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  border: 1px solid #2C2C2E;
}
.game-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}
.game-card iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 480px;
  border: none;
  display: block;
}
.game-card .game-info {
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
}
.game-card .game-title {
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #fff;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
}
.game-card .game-desc {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #B0B0B0;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
}
.game-card .game-tags {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.game-tag {
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #ccc;
  border: 1px solid #3a3a3a;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.game-tag.fire { border-color: #FF3B0A; color: #FF7A00; }
.game-tag.space { border-color: #00e5ff; color: #00e5ff; }
.game-tag.action { border-color: #FFD700; color: #FFD700; }
.game-card .game-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
}
.game-card .game-links a {
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #888;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.game-card .game-links a:hover { color: #fff; }
.coming-soon {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem;
  color: #666;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-style: italic;
}
</style>

<div class="arcade-header">
  <h1>🕹️ ARCADE</h1>
  <p>Games by Anjana Yatawara. Built for fun. Play in browser.</p>
</div>

<div class="game-grid">

  <div class="game-card">
    <iframe src="revenge-of-the-basco.html" allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
    <div class="game-info">
      <div class="game-title">Revenge of the Basco</div>
      <div class="game-desc">Tabasco chooses violence. Tap to fly through hellfire columns. Survive the chaos. Beat the bosses. Don't blink.</div>
      <div class="game-tags">
        <span class="game-tag fire">Fire</span>
        <span class="game-tag action">One-Tap</span>
        <span class="game-tag">Chaos</span>
      </div>
      <div class="game-links">
        <a href="revenge-of-the-basco.html" target="_blank">⛶ Fullscreen</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="game-card">
    <iframe src="sigma-strike.html" allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
    <div class="game-info">
      <div class="game-title">Sigma Strike</div>
      <div class="game-desc">Defend the distribution from rogue outliers. Chain kills for combos, collect power-ups, battle bosses every 10 waves.</div>
      <div class="game-tags">
        <span class="game-tag space">Space</span>
        <span class="game-tag action">Shooter</span>
        <span class="game-tag">Stats</span>
      </div>
      <div class="game-links">
        <a href="sigma-strike.html" target="_blank">⛶ Fullscreen</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="coming-soon">More games coming soon...</div>
```
